claim: Neural-network decoding of the surface code beats state-of-the-art decoders on real hardware data; the successor runs in real time to distance 11.
Deep RL designed an error-robust universal gate set on a real superconducting processor, outperforming default pulses.
RL agents discover quantum error-correcting codes and encoders from scratch against the Knill-Laflamme conditions.
Cryogenic 300-mm wafer probing measures hundreds of spin-qubit devices per wafer at 1.6 K with statistical feedback into fabrication.
A mobile robotic chemist ran a days-long autonomous Bayesian search in a wet-chemistry lab; successors do exploratory synthesis unattended.
The A-Lab's autonomous-synthesis novelty claims were formally corrected: new to the prediction platform, not necessarily new to science.
The Majorana/topological-qubit existence claim is contested in print: claim, formal critique, and reply all published; unresolved.
A closed-loop AI+robotic system is credited with a materials or device advance adopted by a leading qubit platform — discovered by the loop, not merely verified — ~65% by 2031.
A peer-reviewed quantum-hardware result credits no human with performing the experiment in its author-contribution statement — ~40% by 2033.
